final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it serves as a protective indicator against financial distress, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan duration is longer, because longer repayment horizons extend exposure to financial instability, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the applicant has critical or other existing credits, because traditional models typically rely on financial ratios rather than historical credit data, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 재정적 어려움을 방어하는 지표로 인식되어 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 판단됩니다 [1].
대출 기간이 길다는 것은 일반적으로 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
기존 대출이 있는 경우, 전통적인 본 모델에서는 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
